questionHtml: The diagram includes a salt bridge that is filled with a saturated solution of KNO3. Outline the function of the salt bridge.
markschemeHtml:
«keep» each half-cell/electrolyte «electrically» neutral ✔

 

Accept balance charges/ions.

Accept allow ion flow «between cells».

meta.title: The diagram includes a salt bridge that is filled with a saturated solution of KNO3. Outline the function of the salt bridge.
